BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-ChimeraLLM
BundleInfo.Author: ChimeraLLM
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Natural language LLM agent for ChimeraX (OpenAI-compatible API)
BundleInfo.Description: ChimeraLLM provides a chat panel that uses an LLM with function-calling to plan and execute ChimeraX commands from natural language prompts.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Tool :: ChimeraLLM :: General :: Natural language agent for ChimeraX
ChimeraX :: Command :: chimerallm :: General :: Open ChimeraLLM or send a prompt
